mapper.select: SELECT id, name, email, department, salary, hire_date, created_at, updated_at FROM employees ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employees (name, email, department, salary, hire_date) VALUES (#{name}, #{email}, #{department}, #{salary}, #{hireDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE employees SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, department = #{department}, salary = #{salary}, hire_date = #{hireDate}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, email, department, salary, hire_date, created_at, updated_at FROM employees
(LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')) OR LOWER(department) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{department}, '%')))
LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%'))
LOWER(department) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{department}, '%'))
ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees
(LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')) OR LOWER(department) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{department}, '%')))
LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%'))
LOWER(department) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{department}, '%'))
